text: Research 8 small INDEPENDENT NYC restaurants or cafes that PUBLISH a real contact email on their own website (not just a contact form). For each list: name, neighborhood, the published email, and a one-line personalized hook (what's special). Save a clean markdown table to tasks/T-029/restaurants.md. ONLY include ones where you find a real published email. Then: git add -A && git -c user.name=Karen -c user.email=warroom@pinla.local commit -m '[Karen] T-029 NYC restaurant + email research' && (git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)); then bin/warroom-say '[Karen] done: T-029 restaurant research'.
